title: Job Opening Category Manager at Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Job Opening Category Manager at Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Category Manager at our Coimbatore location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates:
Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in A/B Testing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ambrane Asia Pacific Associates!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
